verses.text: Peter writes to the scattered 'strangers,' 'elect according to the foreknowledge of God,' through sanctifying of the Spirit. Chosen pilgrims. Believers are God's elect, sojourning on earth.
Peter writes to the scattered 'strangers,' 'elect according to the foreknowledge of God,' through sanctifying of the Spirit. Chosen pilgrims. Believers are God's elect, sojourning on earth.
Blessed be God, who 'hath begotten us again unto a lively hope' and 'an inheritance... reserved in heaven,' kept by His power. Living hope. The risen Christ secures an undying inheritance.
Blessed be God, who 'hath begotten us again unto a lively hope' and 'an inheritance... reserved in heaven,' kept by His power. Living hope. The risen Christ secures an undying inheritance.
Blessed be God, who 'hath begotten us again unto a lively hope' and 'an inheritance... reserved in heaven,' kept by His power. Living hope. The risen Christ secures an undying inheritance.
Though now for a season grieved by trials, your faith, 'more precious than... gold,' is tried, that you receive 'the salvation of your souls.' Tested faith. Trials refine faith into praise and joy.

The prophets searched diligently of this salvation, things 'the angels desire to look into.' Long foretold. The gospel was the longing of prophets and angels alike.
The prophets searched diligently of this salvation, things 'the angels desire to look into.' Long foretold. The gospel was the longing of prophets and angels alike.

Gird up your minds, be sober, 'be ye holy; for I am holy,' as obedient children. Be holy. The called are to mirror their holy God.

Gird up your minds, be sober, 'be ye holy; for I am holy,' as obedient children. Be holy. The called are to mirror their holy God.
You were redeemed not with silver and gold, but 'with the precious blood of Christ, as of a lamb without blemish.' Costly ransom. Christ's blood, not money, set us free.

Being 'born again... by the word of God,' love one another fervently; flesh fades like grass, but 'the word of the Lord endureth for ever.' New birth. The abiding word brings undying love.
